🐿️ How to Play

Catch acorns. Build Popo's Vault. Survive winter!

🧺Move the basket — drag, or arrow keys / A·D.
🌰Acorn +1 stock · ✨ Gold +10 stock
👟Red Shoes faster · 🧺 Grow / 🤏 Mini basket size
❓Mystery Acorn — random Fever / Vacuum / Slow-Mo!
🔥Combo — catch in a row for big score!
🪨Dodge rocks! 2 hits and your basket breaks — game over!
🪵Branches bounce acorns — aim carefully!
💨Wind & fog shift the acorns. Stay sharp!
🏰Fill the Winter Stock to build the Acorn Vault!
